breakdown.creativeCore: Two-Page Psychological Thriller Manga Spread：Generates a highly detailed, two-page manga spread featuring a protagonist surrounded by clones, complete with 6 total panels, dialogue bubbles, and sound effects.
breakdown.subject: 人物
breakdown.text: 要求精确文字；文字是主视觉
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 杂志封面、专题页、品牌刊物、人物专访视觉

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 海报/封面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: close-up, wide shot, vertical, horizontal]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, manga]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: dramatic lighting]。

Text requirements:
要求精确文字；文字是主视觉。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
